description_long: This is an electric guitar with a contoured, double-cutaway body finished in a light blue color with a white pickguard. The neck and headstock are made of a light wood, likely maple, and the fretboard appears to be the same material. The guitar features six tuning pegs arranged in a single row on the headstock, and a red strap is attached to the body. The bridge is metallic and the control knobs and pickup selector switch are visible on the front. The guitar is displayed on a wooden stand, which supports it upright.
description: A light blue, double-cutaway electric guitar with a white pickguard, maple neck, and red strap, displayed on a wooden stand.
description_view_0: Side view showing the guitar's slim profile, the red strap hanging, and the wooden stand supporting the body.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the light blue back, the full length of the maple neck, and the back of the headstock with tuning pegs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the guitar's thickness, the red strap, and the edge of the pickguard.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the light blue body, white pickguard, pickups, control knobs, bridge, and the full fretboard.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, and a simple, contoured shape.
